name: etechflow/module-vehicle-compat
description: Universal Product Fitment Finder for Magento 2. Make/Model/Year/Part filtering on any fitment domain — automotive, motorcycle, marine, RV, bicycle, phone accessories, watch straps, appliance parts, or any product where customers ask "will this fit my X?". Admin-configurable labels and field visibility. SEO-friendly URLs, PDP fitment badges, customer garage. Theme-agnostic — Hyvä, Luma, custom themes.
